recommendations.title: Beyond the Front Door
recommendations.description: Three views every guest should see, three places we'd send a friend to eat — Urban Elephant's curator's note for Cape Town.
recommendations.subtitle: What we send guests out to see, eat, and explore — the Cape Town we'd recommend to a friend.
recommendations.attractionsDescription: The mountain, the harbour, the streets that change neighbourhood every two blocks. Start here.
recommendations.restaurantsDescription: A short list of three places — one for breakfast, one for lunch, one for dinner. None of them pay us to be here.
recommendations.ctaTitle: Send us a note. We'll send back a longer list.

managed.title: Professionally Managed
managed.description: Unlike ordinary short-term rentals, every Urban Elephant property is operated with dedicated hospitality teams and full guest support.

welcome.title: Where you stay should feel as memorable as the city itself.
welcome.description: From stylish city apartments to coastal escapes, every Urban Elephant stay is carefully designed to combine comfort, personality and hotel-level consistency.
welcome.body: Professionally managed, beautifully located — this is Cape Town accommodation, the Urban Elephant way.

properties.title: Urban Elephant Hotels
properties.subtitle: BOOK YOUR STAY TODAY
properties.description: Select your Hotel from the list below.

onBree.name: Urban Elephant on Bree
onBree.description: Urban Elephant takes immense pride in welcoming you to the exceptional building, 16 On Bree.
onBree.body: The 27th floor boasts an outdoor pool and bar, offering unparalleled views of Table Mountain, cradling this magnificent city. Within this establishment, you'll find stunning apartments, complete with the high-end features you've come to expect from us.

docklands.name: Urban Elephant at The Docklands
docklands.description: The Docklands is an extraordinary building nestled in the heart of the vibrant De Waterkant district.
docklands.body: Our rooftop pool and breathtaking panoramic views consistently leave a lasting impression on our guests, making it an ideal destination for both leisure and business travellers. Secure your reservation at The Docklands today and experience the ultimate in convenience, prime location, breathtaking views, and the signature high-end amenities you've come to anticipate from us.

flamingo.name: Urban Elephant at The Flamingo
flamingo.description: Your seaside escape with effortless elegance.
flamingo.body: Each unit features a simple, elegant design with luxury touches - ideal for working professionals, leisure travellers, or anyone seeking a stylish base near the sea.

rose.name: Urban Elephant at The Rose
rose.description: Meet The Rose - Urban Elephant's latest showstopper at 117 Strand Street, Cape Town.
rose.body: From Table Mountain to Lion's Head, the colourful Bo-Kaap to the endless Atlantic, the 360 degree scenery is seriously next level. Sunrise coffee or sunset views? Yes, please.

tours.title: Tours & Experiences
tours.subtitle: DISCOVER CAPE TOWN
tours.description: Book your Urban Elephant Tours & Transfers directly with us and let our team handle every detail while you relax by the pool.
tours.bookTourHint: Contact us to book this tour

carHire.title: Car Hire
carHire.subtitle: EXPLORE AT YOUR PACE
carHire.description: Premium vehicle rentals for your Cape Town adventure

about.title: A Very Warm Welcome!
about.subtitle: MEET THE FOUNDER
about.tagline: The Brand That Loves You Back
about.founderQuote: Hospitality is more than just a job for me—it's my jam.
about.intro: Hey there! I'm Niles—founder, owner, and self-appointed Chief Elephant Wrangler at Urban Elephant. Originally from the UK (where the weather builds character), I made the move to Cape Town back in 2007.
about.story1: After globe-trotting and seeing the best (and worst) the world has to offer, I knew I'd found something truly special in the Mother City. So, I unpacked my bags, ditched the umbrella, and set out to build something a little different in the world of hospitality.
about.story2: That's how Urban Elephant was born—a place where luxury meets comfort, where style doesn't break the bank, and where every guest feels like a rockstar (or at the very least, a very well-looked-after human).
about.story3: I genuinely love meeting new people, hearing their stories, and helping them create incredible memories while they're in Cape Town. I've built Urban Elephant around this idea: personalised, thoughtful service that goes the extra mile (and sometimes the extra bottle of wine).
about.story4: Every apartment is designed to make you feel at home—but better. Because let's be honest, who wants to do housekeeping at home?
about.team: Of course, none of this would be possible without my amazing team. From our superstar Guest Relations Managers to the housekeeping heroes who keep everything spotless, they're the heart of Urban Elephant. They're friendly, professional, and always up for a good laugh—or a restaurant recommendation.

zola.title: Zola's Story
zola.subtitle: The Spirit of Zola
zola.intro: Every story begins somewhere — ours began with a pink elephant named Zola.
zola.story1: When I was six years old, Zola was my constant companion. She brought comfort, calm, and a quiet reminder that standing out could be something beautiful. While I was captivated by Africa's wild animals, it was this small pink elephant that taught me the power of individuality and warmth.
zola.story2: Years later, that simple lesson became the heart and emblem of Urban Elephant — a brand built on care, character, and connection.
zola.story3: Zola now lives on in our emblem. Her name, which means 'peaceful' and 'calm' in Xhosa, reflects the feeling we want every guest to experience.
zola.closing: At Urban Elephant, you're more than a visitor. You're part of a story that celebrates comfort, creativity, and belonging — the same feeling Zola once gave me.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: These principles guide everything we do, from how we design our spaces to how we welcome our guests.

authentic.title: Authentic Hospitality
authentic.description: We believe in genuine connections. Every interaction is an opportunity to share our love for Cape Town and create memorable experiences.

detail.title: Attention to Detail
detail.description: From the thread count of our linens to the local coffee in your kitchen, we sweat the small stuff so you can simply enjoy.

local.title: Local Expertise
local.description: Born and raised in Cape Town, we share insider knowledge that transforms good trips into extraordinary ones.

sustainable.title: Sustainable Luxury
sustainable.description: Luxury and responsibility can coexist. We're committed to sustainable practices that protect the Cape Town we love.

cta.title: Ready to Experience Cape Town?
cta.description: Let us show you our city through local eyes. Browse our 4-star apartments or get in touch to plan your Cape Town stay.

theHerd.metaTitle: The Herd — Urban Elephant Loyalty Program
theHerd.metaDescription: Join The Herd, Urban Elephant's loyalty program for guests who keep coming home. Members enjoy exclusive direct rates, priority booking, and recognition across every stay.
theHerd.title: The Herd. For guests who keep coming home.
theHerd.subtitle: The Herd is Urban Elephant's loyalty program — for guests who choose to stay with us again, and again. Members are recognised, remembered, and rewarded with exclusive direct rates and priority booking across every Urban Elephant property.
theHerd.welcomeBody1: We're delighted to have you join a community of travellers, explorers, and city lovers who appreciate thoughtful stays, authentic experiences, and the vibrant spirit of Cape Town.
theHerd.welcomeBody2: As a member of The Herd, you enjoy access to exclusive benefits designed to make every stay even more rewarding, including 10% off the lowest available rate when booking directly, priority booking access to new properties and peak-season availability, welcome amenities prepared especially for your stay, and exclusive member offers, promotions, and curated Cape Town experiences.
theHerd.welcomeBody3: At Urban Elephant, we believe hospitality should feel personal, effortless, and memorable. Whether you are visiting for business, leisure, or a long-awaited escape, our team is committed to making every stay exceptional.
theHerd.welcomeBody4: We encourage you to explore our collection of properties, discover local experiences, and enjoy the many advantages that come with being part of The Herd. Should you need assistance at any time, our team is always here to help.
theHerd.whyTitle: Loyalty, memory, belonging — the way elephants do it.
theHerd.whyIntro: Urban Elephant isn't trying to be a cold corporate hotel chain. We want guests to feel like they belong to something — a brand that remembers them and values them. Like an elephant herd, the idea is loyalty, connection, protection, memory, and returning home.

loyalty.title: Loyalty and memory
loyalty.description: Elephants are known for both. The Herd is built on the idea that a brand should remember its guests — and reward them for choosing to come back.

protection.title: Protection and recognition
protection.description: Herds protect and recognise their own. Members are looked after across every Urban Elephant property, with the same standards and the same warmth, every stay.

belonging.title: Returning home
belonging.description: Guests who stay with us repeatedly become part of the Herd. It's less a points scheme and more a recognition that you've chosen Urban Elephant — and we've chosen you back.

premium.title: Emotional, not transactional
premium.description: The Herd isn't about miles and tiers. It's about the small things — a familiar welcome, your usual booking quirks remembered, and an exclusive rate when you book direct.

theHerd.benefitsTitle: What being part of the Herd gets you.

rates.label: Member benefit
rates.title: 10% off the lowest rate
rates.description: Members get 10% off the lowest available rate when booking direct — applied with your member code at checkout.

priority.label: Member benefit
priority.title: Priority booking
priority.description: Early access to new properties and peak-season availability before public release.

amenities.label: Member benefit
amenities.title: Welcome amenities
amenities.description: A small thank-you waiting in your apartment whenever you stay — chosen by Niles, not a corporate template.

offers.label: Member benefit
offers.title: Exclusive offers
offers.description: Members-first access to seasonal promotions, partner experiences, and Cape Town happenings.

theHerd.joinDescription: Drop your name and email and we'll send your member welcome with your direct-booking discount code. No tiers, no fine print, no spam — just a quieter, better way to stay with us.
theHerd.eligibility: The Herd is for guests who've stayed with us at least once. We verify your stay before activating membership — that's how we keep it for guests we already know.

form.disclaimer: By joining you agree to receive occasional emails from Urban Elephant about your membership. Unsubscribe any time.
form.successTitle: We've opened your email — hit send.
form.successBody: Your draft signup is ready in your email client, addressed to Karin. Send it through and we'll set you up in the Herd, then your welcome letter and member discount code arrive by email — the same warm welcome the Herd has been writing for years.

theHerd.bookTitle: Already in the Herd? Book direct, get your member rate.
theHerd.bookDescription: Once you've joined, your member discount code will arrive by email. Apply it on any direct booking — that's how the loyalty rate is honoured today, and the system will become automatic as the program rolls out.
